name: Gooey Butter Cake a La St. Louis, Mo
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the cake mix, melted butter, and beaten eggs together in a medium mixing bowl until crumbly but moist. Pat the mixture evenly over the bottom of a Pam-sprayed jelly roll pan.
2. Set aside while you preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C) and prepare the filling.
3. In a 2-quart bowl, combine cream cheese, powdered sugar, and vanilla extract. Beat with a mixer on medium speed until smooth (about 5 minutes).
4. Pour the cream cheese mixture over the cake layer.
5. Place in the center rack of the oven and bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 30 to 35 minutes or until golden brown and topping resembles that of a nicely baked cheesecake.
6. Cool on a rack for 1 hour.
7. Cut into neat serving squares and refrigerate, covered with plastic wrap, to serve within a few days. Does not freeze well.
